description_long: This is a compact, handheld electric drill with a robust, ergonomic design, primarily colored in olive green with black accents. The drill features a textured grip handle, a visible trigger button, and a detachable battery pack at the base labeled '18V 1.3Ah LITHIUM-ION.' The front section houses a black, ribbed chuck with a twist bit installed, suitable for various drilling tasks. The body displays the 'GUILD' brand logo and technical specifications, while the rear section includes several ventilation slots for cooling. The overall construction suggests a durable plastic exterior with internal metal components for the motor and gearing.
description: A compact olive green and black electric drill with a visible trigger, battery pack, and twist drill bit, branded 'GUILD.' Features ergonomic grip and ventilation slots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular chuck with twist bit, the handle, and the battery pack base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'GUILD' logo, trigger button, ergonomic grip, and battery pack details.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the ventilation slots and the back of the handle and battery pack.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with technical labels, trigger, and full profile of the drill and battery pack.
